requirementCueLines: [Page 1] A minimum grade of 2.0 is required in
[Page 1] B CHEM 143/144: General Chemistry I w/ Lab 6
[Page 1] B EE 215: Fundamentals of Electrical Engineering 4 *B PHYS 122: Electromagnetism & Oscillatory
[Page 1] Students can take up to 15 EE credits
[Page 1] B EE 235: Continuous Time Linear Systems 5
[Page 1] credits must be earned at your home
[Page 1] B ENGR 495: Capstone Project in Engineering I 3
[Page 1] B ENGR 496: Capstone Project in Engineering II 4 Social Science (SSc): 15 credits
[Page 1] to 15 credits a year at another UW
[Page 1] 5 Free Electives to reach 180 credits required for degree
